vibe_description: The sun is too close and too confident. Hot, dry, and absolutely relentless. Hydration is not optional.
vibe_parameters: Max temp >= 90F, no meaningful rain, wind < 25 mph.

vibe_description: Hot, humid, and raining. Nobody asked for this combination and yet here we are. You will be damp from both directions and there is nothing you can do about it.
vibe_parameters: Meaningful rain (precip >= 0.10 in or precip hours >= 2), wind < 25 mph, and max temp >= 86F.
